project.name: Flowable Test Spring Boot Starter
project.description: The artifact consumers actually depend on (test scope). Pure aggregator: pulls in flowable-test-core + flowable-test-autoconfigure and nothing else. Kafka/HTTP-mocking support stay opt-in; add org.springframework.kafka:spring-kafka-test and/or org.wiremock:wiremock-standalone yourself to light up those capabilities; this starter never forces either on a project that doesn't use them. See the README for the full dependency list to add depending on which capabilities you want.
